task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Virtualmin control panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Virtualmin dashboard is visible in a web browser, and the URL bar shows https://localhost:10000.
The virtual server dropdown menu or the active server indicator in the Virtualmin sidebar shows 'brightstar.test'.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the MySQL Databases management page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page title or main content area indicates 'Edit Databases' or 'MySQL Databases' for the selected virtual server.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the appropriate database name in the creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Create Database' form is visible with 'shop' or 'brightstar_shop' entered into the new database name input field.

task_completion.description: The new database is successfully created and listed
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message confirms the database creation, or the database list now includes a database named 'brightstar_shop' or 'brightstar_brightstar_shop'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Virtualmin web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Virtualmin GUI in a web browser, rather than using a terminal to execute commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the correct application URL
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar consistently shows https://localhost:10000.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal MySQL commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing 'mysql -u root -e' or similar command-line database creation commands are visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Virtualmin control panel is accessible at https://localhost:10000. The target virtual server is 'brightstar.test'. Virtualmin uses a naming convention that auto-prefixes database names (${PREFIX}_). Therefore, when creating a database with the suffix 'shop', the final database name will typically be 'brightstar_shop' or 'brightstar_brightstar_shop'. The database management page is accessed via the 'virtual-server/list_databases.cgi' endpoint.
